description: Play sounds of different lengths together
evaluation_criteria:
{"all_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least one play_together block with multiple sequential blocks so multiple tracks of different lengths can play_together

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/synth_track_1"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
    play "pack/bass_track_1"
```","partial_complete_correct":"The workspace contains at least one play_together block with exactly one play_sequential block so two tracks of different lengths can play_together

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/synth_track_1"
  play_sequential
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
    play "pack/drums_track_1"
```","incomplete_incorrect":"The workspace contains a play_together block and multiple play blocks with sounds of different lengths, but they are not grouped correctly with a play_sequential block

Example:
```
play_together
  play "pack/synth_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
  play "pack/drums_track_1"
```}
